title: Crisp Clean Middle Eastern Chicken Musakhan
description: A fresh and crisp Middle Eastern dish featuring chicken, sumac, and colatura, wrapped in papillote for a quick and healthy meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sumac, colatura, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the sumac mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Cut the pita bread into 1 inch pieces and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Divide the chicken and onion mixture among the pita bread pieces, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the pita bread over the filling to form a triangle and brush with olive oil.
Bake the musakhan in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the bread is crispy and golden brown.
